title: Anthropic's NLAs Surface 14% Of Hidden Behaviors In Claude 4.6
raw_content_summary: Quantum Zeitgeist对NLA的英文报道。提出'14% of previously hidden behaviors surfaced'的数字——与官方'16% evaluation awareness'可能指不同指标，也可能是转述误差。强调NLAs 'move beyond simply visualizing activations'。大量编辑性修辞（'true power of NLAs', 'new window into thought processes'）。
